200.description: Details about the selected subscription feature.

schema.description: A representation of a subscription feature.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

IdSubscription.description: Id of the Subscription related to the SubscriptionFeature.

IdFeature.description: Id of the Feature related to the SubscriptionFeature.

QuantityIncluded.description: Limitation/Quota/NumberOfUnit of the Feature included in the Subscription of the Customer.

QuantityCurrent.description: Current Limitation/Quota/NumberOfUnit of the Feature available for the Customer.

Properties.description: List of properties of the SubscriptionFeature
Properties.title: FeatureProperties

QuantityMax.description: Limit max of Feature for the Step.

Increment.description: Quantity of Feature per Increment (Size of Increment) for the Step.

AmountPerIncrement.description: Amount in cents per Increment for the Step.

AmountCeiling.description: Amount max in cents for the Step.

schema.title: SubscriptionFeature
